programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri pays tribute to the talented vet techs on her team who keep her practice running.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri travels to the remote town of Thompson to deal with a critical shortage in veterinarian care; along the way, she falls in love with the area and the people who live there.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri visits her longstanding cattle clients, many of whom have been farming the land for multiple generations.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri looks after her senior patients, and the emotional responsibility that comes with ensuring all pets have a good quality of life, as she deals with her own dog Two Bit's cancer diagnosis.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a man escape a town's vengeance only to risk capture when they stop to help an injured man.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo unearths vital evidence proving the innocence of a man wrongfully accused of murder.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri pays tribute to the talented vet techs on her team who keep her practice running.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri travels to the remote town of Thompson to deal with a critical shortage in veterinarian care; along the way, she falls in love with the area and the people who live there.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to run the Taronga Zoo Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on the shores of Sydney Harbour.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: A large canine appears to have a taste for colourful kitchenware. A potentially fatal foreign body tests the skills of Dr. Heather Suttie, while Westwinds Mobile Veterinary Services team hits the road to help a horse with chomping challenges.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: Dr. G and Ben deal with a green-gobbling patient. Dr. Heather Suttie has a full caseload which includes a puppy lured by a foreign body and an out-of-sorts cat who mysteriously refuses to eat.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a man escape a town's vengeance only to risk capture when they stop to help an injured man.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo unearths vital evidence proving the innocence of a man wrongfully accused of murder.

programme.title: Wild Fish
programme.desc: An exhausting battle with a colossal white sturgeon pushes Cyril to the limit, but before the team can tag the eight-foot giant, it gives...

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril heads upriver through the jungle in search of the redtail catfish.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: Niall is on Australia's Mary River where he plans to find the world's largest reptile-saltwater crocodiles- to take measurements and release back into the wild.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A black rhino labor takes an alarming turn; a kangaroo needs surgery.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri looks after bulls who seem determined to hurt themselves.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri's dog, Siri, brings home a wild baby fox, which starts her on a quest to learn more about caring for wildlife.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Permit delays ruin the Poseidon Crew's hopes of a massive payday on their famed ground; a torrential downpour forces Shane and Russell to evacuate their dig site.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Jacqui and Andrew are targeted by potential gold thieves; Marcus and Linden hunt ground close to the site of the biggest nugget ever found in Western Australia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Offshore Outlaw takes risks in a short window to catch more bluefin as a huge storm approaches; Doghouse fights to maintain their hot streak and the lead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps rescue a ballerina who wants to defect from her Iron Curtain captors.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo hides two horses destined to be destroyed and uses them to save a busload of children during a violent storm.

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: The Coldwater Captains relive the most exciting moments of the past three seasons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: Off the east coast of Newfoundland, the crew of the Atlantic Bandit heads into the world's deadliest ocean; in Cox's Cove, the Crane's Legacy is running two days behind the rest of the crab fishing fleet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: Skipper Morris Anstey and the crew of the Sebastian Sails are in a sea of trouble; the Crane's Legacy is well into the most punishing halibut season the crew has ever encountered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A gibbon finds his song; platypuses return to a national park.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Shed antler hunting nearly turns lethal for one man; training for game wardens becomes eerily realistic; one camp of unruly hunters attracts the attention of wardens; when an endangered grizzly bear is shot, wardens come out in full force.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew finally start digging legendary ground in search of a multi-million-dollar nugget; Shane and Russell endure the snake-ridden wilderness in Pilbara.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A robbery at the Gold Retrievers' camp puts more pressure on Chris and Brad's partnership; Marcus and Linden finally hit a rich patch of nuggets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Intense weather keeps most of the boats tied up, but one captain goes AWOL to score big.
